SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF HUIMING ZHEN WITH THE HELP OF COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER AND DEFENDANT LIEWELLYN LEDBETTER. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
